AddRelate SDEADM.TRN_STREET_RIVA FDMID SDEADM.TRN_street FDMID "Relate TRN_STREET_RIVA to TRN_street" "One to many"
AddRelate SDEADM.TRN_STREET_RIVA FDMID SDEADM.TRN_street_retired FDMID "Relate TRN_STREET_RIVA to TRN_street_retired" "One to many"
AddField E:\HRM\Scripts\SDE\SQL\Prod\prod_RW_sdeadm.sde\SDEADM.TRN_street_RIVA DATE_ACT Date # # # "Added By" NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField E:\HRM\Scripts\SDE\SQL\Prod\prod_RW_sdeadm.sde\SDEADM.TRN_street_RIVA SYS_DATE Date # # # "Modified By" NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.4000

descript.abstract: A table containing attributes on HRM owned streets.
descript.supplinf: Table Capture Rules: Table is currently created from two data sources: 1) SDEADM.TRN_street_work and 2) SDEADM.AST_pavement_rating. The table is create using a python script. This script is called RoadsToRiva.py and is located in T:\work\asset_mgmt\PythonScripts. A text version of the steps is located in R:\Shared Services\Data Division\Data Management Team\Project Documentation\ICT Projects\BPIM-107 PSAB 3150.
descript.purpose: The table is used to feed the RIVA EA module street asset data to meet PSAB standards.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.

idinfo.useconst: This information has been collected and/or procured for the internal use of HRM staff (and its agencies) and may not be distributed without consulting the proper authorities.
idinfo.datacred: 1) SDEADM.TRN_street_work - Civic Addessing, Data Management, Business Planning and Information Management 2) SDEADM.AST_pavement_rating - Infrastructure Management, Design and Construction, Infrastructure and Asset Management

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntaddr.address: PO Box 1749 C/O 21 Mount Hope Ave

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attr.attrdef: This is a unique identifier for each street name, also unique between GSA boundaries.
This represents the name of each street (i.e Robie, Hollis).
This represents the type of street (i.e. Ave, St, Blvd). A full list of standardized street types is available from Civic Addressing staff.
This represents the general service area (911 Community) name within the HRM.
Indicates if the street segment is open for public use.
This represents the full name of a street (i.e. Robie St).
Date that HRM accepted the street take-over.
The source of the addition of the segment.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: These values are maintained by the Traffic Division of the HRM. These represent the proposed classes. The values are self-explanatory.
A unique identifier assigned to each street segment for use with the Fire Dispatch System.
Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

cntAddress.delPoint: PO Box 1749 C/O 21 Mount Hope Ave

dataIdInfo.idAbs: A table containing attributes on HRM owned streets.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: The table is used to feed the RIVA EA module street asset data to meet PSAB standards.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: 1) SDEADM.TRN_street_work - Civic Addessing, Data Management, Business Planning and Information Management 2) SDEADM.AST_pavement_rating - Infrastructure Management, Design and Construction, Infrastructure and Asset Management

Consts.useLimit: This information has been collected and/or procured for the internal use of HRM staff (and its agencies) and may not be distributed without consulting the proper authorities.

dataIdInfo.suppInfo: Table Capture Rules: Table is currently created from two data sources: 1) SDEADM.TRN_street_work and 2) SDEADM.AST_pavement_rating. The table is create using a python script. This script is called RoadsToRiva.py and is located in T:\work\asset_mgmt\PythonScripts. A text version of the steps is located in R:\Shared Services\Data Division\Data Management Team\Project Documentation\ICT Projects\BPIM-107 PSAB 3150.
dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows Server 2016 Technical Preview Version 10.0 (Build 20348) ; Esri ArcGIS 13.3.7.52636
